from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List


@dataclass
class AppConfig:
    timezone: str = "UTC"
    locale: str = "en_US"
    currency: str = "USD"
    tax_rate: float = 0.08
    max_order_qty: int = 100
    invoice_prefix: str = "INV"
    invoice_format: str = "pdf"


@dataclass
class User:
    name: str
    email: str
    timezone: str = "UTC"
    locale: str = "en_US"


@dataclass
class Order:
    user: User
    items: List[dict]
    currency: str = "USD"
    tax_rate: float = 0.08


@dataclass
class Product:
    name: str
    price: float
    max_quantity: int = 100


@dataclass
class Invoice:
    order: Order
    prefix: str = "INV"
    format: str = "pdf"
